name: Scrumptious Banana Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients.
2. Add the shortening, buttermilk, and mashed bananas to the sifted dry ingredients.
3. Beat for 2 minutes.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating for an additional 2 minutes after each addition.
5. Stir in chopped walnuts until blended.
6. Pour batter into greased and floured 9x13x2-inch pan (or two 9-inch pans).
7. Bake in a preheated oven set to 350°F (175°C) for 30-35 minutes in round pans, or 45 minutes in the larger pan.
8. Cool completely before frosting with buttercream frosting.
